title: Junior Business Development Manager at InfraMantra

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at InfraMantra
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!
